query: mixed white balance interior window photograph orange blue contrast
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — mixed white balance interior, dual color temperatures clash

response.objective_caption: An upward interior view of a grand Beaux-Arts terminal featuring a teal vaulted ceiling with circular decorative medallions and faint painted constellation details, cream-colored stone walls with ornate carved moldings, a large grid of metal-framed windows admitting natural light, an illuminated sign reading "TO VANDERBILT AVENUE THE CAMPBELL APARTMENT," an arched opening with sculptural stonework, and a continuous row of warm light fixtures lining the architectural cornice.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An upward interior view of a grand Beaux-Arts terminal captured with a deliberately skewed, off-level rotation, showing a teal vaulted ceiling with circular decorative medallions and painted constellation details, cream-colored stone walls with ornate carved moldings, a large grid of metal-framed windows admitting natural light, an illuminated sign reading "TO VANDERBILT AVENUE THE CAMPBELL APARTMENT," an arched opening with sculptural stonework, and a continuous row of warm light fixtures lining the cornice, the tilted framing introducing compositional instability and dynamism against the formal architecture.
